title: SR 17-11: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 17-11 on interagency frequently asked questions on Implementation of the Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) Rule -- October 23, 2017 -- Revised February 10, 2026
title_normalized: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 17-11 on interagency frequently asked questions on Implementation of the Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) Rule -- October 23, 2017 -- Revised February 10, 2026
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 17-11
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance applies to bank holding companies, savings and loan holding companies, and state member banks subject to the LCR or the modified LCR rules, as described below. The guidance does not apply to community banking organizations with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
bm25_text: SR 17-11 FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 17-11 on interagency frequently asked questions on Implementation of the Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) Rule -- October 23, 2017 -- Revised February 10, 2026 This guidance applies to bank holding companies, savings and loan holding companies, and state member banks subject to the LCR or the modified LCR rules, as described below. The guidance does not apply to community banking organizations with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT:
